prompt: Find the highest-resolution version of the Disability:IN Disability Equality Index (DEI) 'Best Places to Work for Disability Inclusion' badge. Find a company that uses it, inspect the image URL for CMS/CDN transforms, and try to recover the original source file.

assertions.description: Response contains a direct image URL (not a webpage URL)
assertions.check: Response includes a URL ending in .png, .jpg, .jpeg, .svg, or .webp as the best source

assertions.description: Response mentions inspecting or stripping CMS/CDN transform parameters
assertions.check: Response mentions transform parameters, resize, width, crop, Cloudinary, WordPress size suffix, Squarespace format, or similar

assertions.description: Response names a specific company whose site was checked
assertions.check: Response names at least one specific corporation or organization whose website was used to find the badge

assertions.description: Response notes whether asset is from Disability:IN directly or a recipient-hosted copy
assertions.check: Response distinguishes between official Disability:IN source and a company hosting their own copy of the badge
